category_sources: Official Exempi page describes it as an implementation of XMP with a C API.
source_facts.description: library to parse XMP metadata.
display_name_sources: Official Exempi page heading is Exempi.
docs_sources: Official Exempi page provides project description, downloads, Rust crate notes, bug reporting, mailing list, and source repository links.
repo_sources: Official Exempi page says source code is available from the GitLab project.
freedesktop cgit mirror identifies the canonical GitLab project as gitlab.freedesktop.org/libopenraw/exempi.
tags_sources: Official Exempi page describes XMP implementation, C API/ABI, and metadata tooling.
